principle: WLT is the sole owner of financial truth. DSH is the operational layer. This boundary is enforced by guard and is a DO_NOT_MERGE condition if violated.
dsh_allowed_to_store_or_display: paymentSessionId (opaque reference ID only — no financial content)

wlt_runtime_state.wlt_000_scope: Reference-only endpoints: payment_status_refs, settlement_status_refs, refund_status_refs, wallet_refs
wlt_runtime_state.wlt_generated_client: NOT_GENERATED — required before any DSH surface consumes WLT data at runtime
wlt_runtime_state.wlt_mobile_surfaces: NOT_STARTED — all mobile WLT surfaces have gitkeep only
wlt_runtime_state.wlt_control_panel: SKELETON_PROOF_ONLY — WltFinanceReadOnlySkeletonProof.tsx present but not a production screen

dsh_reference_to_wlt.allowed_usage: DSH surfaces may import from services/wlt/frontend/shared/dsh/ to read WLT reference status for display. No mutation calls permitted.
dsh_reference_to_wlt.forbidden_usage: DSH surfaces must NOT call WLT mutation endpoints directly. DSH must NOT own financial state.
dsh_reference_to_wlt.current_active_usage: NOT_YET_ACTIVE_IN_SURFACES — WLT reference controller is wired but no DSH surface yet renders WLT data (WLT-000 only provides the reference layer)

wlt_contract_only_rules.when_applicable: When WLT is in CONTRACT_ONLY or foundation-only state (WLT-000)
forbidden_in_this_state: Creating financial backend, database, or API within DSH
Registering PASS for financial mutation tests
Placing financial mutation inside any DSH layer
Generating a WLT TypeScript client with mutation operations
wlt_contract_only_rules.current_state: WLT-000 Foundation RUNTIME_VERIFIED — reference endpoints only

donor_boundary_assessment.detail: Donor migration 025 explicitly dropped refund_amount and settlement_amount columns from DSH stores. Donor dsh-wlt-boundary.ts declares mutation: forbidden.
donor_boundary_assessment.assessment: CLEAN — boundary is respected in donor. Boundary logic adopted in new repo.

dsh_010_constraint.allowed: Display WLT-provided settlement and payment status summaries in control-panel finance section using FinanceReadOnlyFrame archetype
dsh_010_constraint.forbidden: Any calculation, mutation, or aggregation of financial data within DSH
dsh_010_constraint.requires: WLT settlement-summary and payment-status-summary read endpoints (require WLT-001 approval)

wlt_activation_sequence.step_1: WLT-000 Foundation — RUNTIME_VERIFIED (done — reference endpoints only)
wlt_activation_sequence.step_3: Generate WLT TypeScript client after WLT-001 contract is defined
wlt_activation_sequence.step_4: DSH-005 Checkout Intent consumes WLT payment-sessions reference
wlt_activation_sequence.step_5: DSH-010 Finance Visibility consumes WLT settlement-summary read endpoint
wlt_activation_sequence.current_step: step_1 reference-only foundation complete. Runtime consumption and all mutation readiness remain blocked until step_2 approval and step_3 generated client completion.

violations_register.note: No DSH/WLT boundary violations found in current codebase audit.

wlt_financial_state_machine.principle: WLT owns all financial state. DSH references paymentSessionId/paymentStatus only. DSH must not replicate, compute, or store financial state calculations.
wlt_financial_state_machine.provider_decision: TBD_CONFIG_REQUIRED — abstract provider contract; decided at WLT-001 approval
wlt_financial_state_machine.rollback_rule: partial refund -> recalculate commission/tax/settlement through WLT; invalid transition -> no state mutation

dsh_reference_policy.allowed: DSH surfaces may display paymentSessionId and paymentStatus (read-only reference). No other financial state visible to DSH.
dsh_reference_policy.forbidden: DSH must not consume, store, or react to WLT internal state transitions other than final paymentStatus references.

wlt_financial_state_machine.required_for_topic: WLT-001 (Payment Sessions), WLT-002 (Settlements), WLT-003 (Refunds) — all require separate approval
wlt_financial_state_machine.note: Full WLT financial state machine diagram required before WLT-001 execution. Currently BLOCKED_NEEDS_WLT.
